appResetDone.message: The extension has been reset and the default values have been restored.

appSubtitle.message: Export your classes and exams to your favorite calendar.

blockHint.message: Drag the blocks into the order you want them to appear in the event title.

errorDateOrder.message: The end date must be after the start date.

errorDates.message: Choose a start date and end date.

errorNoEventsToExport.message: There are no events to export in this range with this selection.

errorOpenUpf.message: Open the UPF calendar in this tab first.

extDescription.message: Export your UPF class timetable from Virtual Secretary or gestioacadèmica to Google Calendar, Apple Calendar and Outlook.

help1.message: Open the UPF virtual secretary (recommended for better accuracy) or gestioacadèmica.

help5.message: Select the subjects you want to export.

help6.message: Enable Create one .ics per selected subject if you want to import each subject into a different calendar.

help8.message: The .ics file is a calendar file. In Google Calendar, go to Settings → Import & export → Import, select the .ics file and choose the calendar where you want to add the events.

helpImportant.message: IMPORTANT: To get colors in Google Calendar, create one calendar per subject and assign a different color to each calendar. Then import each subject's .ics into its corresponding calendar.

importErrorNote.message: If Google Calendar shows the error “Could not import this file. Please try again later.”, wait 10 seconds and click import again.

noSubjectsInRange.message: No subjects were detected in this range.

pageNotUpf.message: You are not on the timetable from the UPF virtual secretary or from gestioacadèmica. Open the calendar and click the extension again.

pageUpf.message: UPF page detected. You can export using your active session.

privacyNotice.message: The extension processes data locally in the browser. It does not collect, sell, or transmit personal data, credentials, or academic information to external servers.

reading.message: Reading events from your active UPF session...

subjectsSubtitle.message: Click “Detect subjects” to choose what to export.

unofficialNotice.message: Unofficial extension. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or maintained by Universitat Pompeu Fabra.
